name: url-shortener
description: Monorepo root — run all services from here

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "server,worker,client" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix server run dev:worker" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "server,worker" "npm --prefix server start" "npm --prefix server run worker"
